error_signature: AI does not distinguish between similar product names
title: AI agent fails to differentiate similar product names
symptom: The AI agent incorrectly states that similar products are not available, despite them being present in the database.
applies_when: Using an AI agent to query product availability
not_this_if: Products have unique identifiers like SKUs
AI agent is configured to use SKUs for lookups
root_cause: The AI agent is directly processing product names from the Google Sheet, leading to confusion between similar names. Without a proper mapping to unique identifiers, the AI cannot accurately determine product availability.
fix_steps: Add a fuzzy matching step or a Function node with Fuse.js after the Customer Message node.
Map the customer's input to the corresponding SKU using the fuzzy matching.
Query the Google Sheet by SKU instead of product name.
Pass only the relevant product row to the AI for response generation.
agent_instruction: Implement a fuzzy matching step to map customer queries to product SKUs before querying the Google Sheet.
